project_context.domain: Gamified fintech trading platform & sports analytics dashboard

rules: Use Vazirmatn for all Persian text.
Use JetBrains Mono for Coin balances, stock prices, and multipliers.
Never use default generic fonts. Load Vazirmatn and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
Ensure text sizes accommodate Persian script which often needs slightly more vertical breathing room.
Use Dark Navy (#060B19) as the absolute anchor.
Use Neon Purple and Cyan for ambient glows and brand moments.
Use Bright Green and Magenta strictly for positive/negative financial indicators (ROI, Goals, Cards).
NO muddy gradients. Use 1px borders with glowing drop-shadows.
Dashboard follows a dense 'Control Room' grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
ALWAYS use dir='rtl' on the root HTML. Tailwind utility classes must use logical properties (ps-4, pe-4, ms-auto, border-s).
Cards must have at least p-6 padding to prevent text collision.
surfaces: Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0F1626]/70 border border-white/10 for floating navs and sticky headers.
Data Cards: Solid #0F1626 background, 1px border-white/5, subtle inner shadow.
Grid Borders: Use border-collapse for the 12 Group Tables.

specific_instructions: Flags: DO NOT USE EMOJIS. Use .
Avatars: Use DiceBear for generated players: .
Tables: 12 Group Tables must be compact, using Shadcn Table.
Coins: Use the generated 3D fantasy coin image for the Coin icon.
Trading UI: Blind bidding needs Shadcn Dialog + Form.
Ledger Feed: Auto-scrolling or latest-first list with bright green/magenta transaction highlights.
Testing: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='buy-team-btn').

rules: Coin transactions must have a subtle flash (green or magenta) on update.
Hovering over team cards lifts them (-translate-y-1) and intensifies the neon border glow.

image_urls.description: Fantasy Coin Icon (3D futuristic soccer cryptocurrency)
Dark Navy Premium Sports Dashboard Background with subtle neon flares
Night soccer stadium lights for login screen background

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with RTL support (dir='rtl' in index.html).
Install and configure Vazirmatn and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
Set up Tailwind to use logical properties for RTL spacing (e.g., use 'ps', 'pe', 'ms', 'me' instead of 'pl', 'pr', 'ml', 'mr').
Create the hybrid layout: Sidebar navigation for Desktop, Bottom Bar for Mobile.
Implement the 'God Mode' Admin Panel securely.
Build the Public Ledger Feed with real-time aesthetic.
Build the My Portfolio bento grid.
DO NOT USE EMOJIS for flags under any circumstance.
Include data-testid on every clickable button, form input, and table row.
